title: TXT Connector Options
text: TXT Connector Options You can assign connector options by setting USYS$TXT_PARAMS in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file. USYS$TXT_PARAMS = uni = Value { , bom = Value } Options uni bom Syntax Rules The syntax rules for setting connector options are: Options can be set using either a colon ( : ) or an equals sign ( = ). Thus Option : Value is the same as Option = Value . For example: ri:on and ri=on . The total length of the assignment should not exceed 80 characters. Use the short format shown in the example for multiple options. Each option must be specified only once Multiple options must be separated by commas ( , ) Words and numbers within each option are separated by one or more spaces or tabs Options are not case-dependent Was this topic helpful?
